summary: Verified all changes from the Emanator E1 refactoring: canvasUpdated scoping fix, system prompt rewrite, read_files output changes, Dashboard.jsx hooks extraction. All tests pass.

useSandboxOps.js (178 lines) and useMediaBin.js (98 lines) properly extracted with all dependencies
System prompt in message-stream.js now has clear tool hierarchy: search_replace > edit_lines > patch_files (deprecated)
All read_files outputs now recommend search_replace instead of edit_lines
